description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed neckline and graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Vintage styling on this classic T-shirt is a sure fire way of upping the style stakes with your off-duty ensembles. Cut a dash in this T-shirt from locomotive with its fashionable styling when you pair it with form fitting denims and casual shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M of height 6' and shoulders 18”
